description: CompositionKhakhi jacket made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, detachable hoodie with drawstring, zippered placket on the front, patch pocket on the left chest, zippered pocket on the right chest with a mock buttoned flap, zippered insert pockets on the sides and has a lining with a secret compartmentFittingComfortWash careDo not washDo not bleach, tumble dry or wringIron on lowDry cleanableThe rugged stitch detailing and zippered pockets add smooth styling to this khakhi jacket from turtle, while the lining ensures you stay insulated. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team this with shirts or t-shirts and jeans.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
